description: The complete set-up contains four centrifugal pumps, each driven by an induction motor. Two measurement methods, four motor speeds and 11 fault types can be induced at various severity levels.

publications.title: Motor Current and Vibration Monitoring Dataset for various Faults in an E-motor-driven Centrifugal Pump

comments.name: description
comments.value: Type of fault introduced onto the bearing

comments.name: description
comments.value: Motor speed of the axile that drives the bearing

comments.name: description
comments.value: The test setup consists of an electric induction motor driving a centrifugal pump, instrumented for vibration and motor-current monitoring. Standard deep-groove ball bearings are installed in both the motor and pump. Various bearing faults and mechanical defects are intentionally introduced (e.g., inner-race, outer-race, rolling-element damage, lubrication contamination). Sensor data are recorded under controlled operating conditions to create a labeled dataset for condition monitoring and fault diagnosis.
